description: Open Targets provides a public biomedical platform for identifying and prioritising potential therapeutic drug targets by integrating target, disease, drug, variant, and association data. It offers web access and programmatic access to that dataset and related analyses.
summary: Open Targets exposes a public GraphQL API at `https://api.platform.opentargets.org/api/v4/graphql` plus a public MCP server at `https://mcp.platform.opentargets.org/mcp`; no developer auth credentials or CLI were documented.
